hold_rationale: No numeric overrides changed this tick. (1) NO spec-hard trigger fired. Every threshold remains on its tolerance side of the fire line, with buffers now WIDER than at 14:30: book +0.309% (inside -1% by 130.9 bps — WIDEST of session), MAHABANK -5.37% (INSIDE -6% by 63 bps, INSIDE -7% by 163 bps, INSIDE -8% by 263 bps — all widened 40 bps), BFSI 36.17% (inside 37% by 0.83 pp), HINDUNILVR -2.12% (inside -4% by 188 bps, widened 48 bps). (2) The 14:30 ARMED CONDITIONAL specifically targeted at this 15:00 tick ('if silence 3h+ AND MAHABANK below -5.88% → elevate to conditional HIGH') FAILED its component test for the THIRD consecutive tick: silence leg TRUE (4h 17m), but MAHABANK leg FALSE AND MOVING AWAY — MAHABANK recovered from -5.77% to -5.37%, 51 bps INSIDE the -5.88% arming line (was 11 bps inside at 14:30). The conditional elevation path continues to cleanly evaluate to 'do not elevate' with WIDENING buffer. (3) Book recovery has CROSSED INTO POSITIVE TERRITORY — 3rd consecutive beneficial tick (+₹846 → +₹1,485 → +₹3,359) with an accelerating, not decelerating, improvement. Firing a lever on an accelerating-beneficial regime would be doubly counter-directional. (4) MAHABANK broke the 2-tick flat plateau UPWARD (+40 bps) and crossed back inside -5.5% composite-HIGH threshold — composite HIGH dropped from 2-of-3 to 1-of-3 via a COMPONENT REVERSAL (strongest de-escalation signal of the session). Moving further toward LOW-elevation, not HIGH. (5) HINDUNILVR 2nd consecutive recovery tick, widening trajectory. (6) BFSI concentration nominally tightened 0.92 → 0.83 pp buffer, but the cause is AUBANK +87 bps MTM firming — a strongly positive P&L phenomenon that mechanically increases sector %. The 13:30/14:00/14:30 spec's explicit MTM-only gate applies for the 4th consecutive tick: do NOT fire min_confidence on this. A durable invocation pattern. (7) AUBANK triangle gain-leg TRIPPED this tick as projected — triangle advanced to 2-of-3 (gain + oversize) but CAPPED at 2-of-3 for the session. Unacted leg is FALSE via today's 2 durable SELLs. Per 14:00/14:30 spec, 2-of-3 without unacted does not lever-fire. Record for strategy_reviewer's 16:30 tick as flagged at 14:30. (8) Strategy silence 4h TRIP fired as projected at 14:43:24. Per 14:00 pattern-extension spec, 4h-alone WITHOUT co-occurring book ≤ -0.5% AND MAHABANK ≤ -5.88% does NOT mechanically elevate composite HIGH. Both co-conditions currently FAILED by wide margins (book +0.309%, MAHABANK -5.37%). Silence-alone remains strategy_reviewer's domain, NOT risk_monitor's. The 16:30 strategy_reviewer is the native escalation path. (9) Admission surface open for 4h 17m with no admission — tightening max_deployed_pct now would simulate strategy-layer activity by closing a door that is not being walked through; undoing the beneficial SELL → freed-cash → quality-gated-BUY regime without trigger-firing evidence. (10) Existing override stack (min_confidence 0.60, max_position_pct 0.15, max_deployed_pct 0.70, default_sl_pct 0.015, min_sl_pct 0.01, max_sl_pct 0.04) already gates every admission surface tightly. Adding collateral knobs during an accelerating-beneficial regime with composite HIGH dropping from 2-of-3 to 1-of-3 would be structurally contra-indicated. Disciplined HOLD is the correct action. (11) Risk level REMAINS MEDIUM (unchanged). Not stepped to HIGH — all trigger-fire conditions failed, composite dropped 2-of-3 → 1-of-3. Not stepped to LOW — the grandfathered structural breaches (AUBANK 18.73%, BFSI 36.17%) plus the 4h silence regime prevent LOW step-down without strategy-layer engagement on the structural issues.
